top_signals.title: Rubio ratchets up pressure on NATO at key summit
top_signals.summary: Secretary of State Marco Rubio is casting new doubt on NATO's relevance after key allies recoiled from backing Washington’s “Operation Epic Fury.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Lantheus Weighs Potential $7 Billion Sale Following Offer From Curium
top_signals.summary: Lantheus Holdings Inc. is weighing a sale after getting a takeover offer from Curium that values the radiopharma company at about $7 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.
